core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not present in Java 21; code using these annotations will fail to compile or run without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta replacement.

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI-based URL creation to comply with Java 21 security restrictions.
plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.why_exists: java.net.URL(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21 and throws IllegalArgumentException for certain protocols or is restricted by security managers; using URI.create().toURL() is the required modern approach.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled for JDK 21 due to class file version incompatibilities.
